conditions: The storm has passed and the clouds have cleared, paving the way for another beautiful Sunday fun day here in the Tetons. 3" of new snow has fallen with colder temperatures returning to the high country.  Look for mostly clear and sunny skies today with moderate winds trending out of the Northwest at 11-16 MPH. Afternoon gusts will range from 20-27 MPH. Daytime temperatures will climb into the low teens at the Tram summit station, while the base area in Teton Village will hit the low 30's by lunchtime. The high elevations will be skiing nicely with a 3" touch up and the colder overnight temps have kept snow conditions prime for the harvest. Treat yourself to a helping of the latest round of new snow to close out your weekend. Stay safe out there! -MB
